title: Ren'Py translation game profile
description: Per-game/per-language config consumed by extract_strings.py, translate_api.py, qa_check.py, and build_patch.py. All relative paths are resolved against the profile file's directory.

game_name.description: Display name of the game, e.g. "Being a DIK"

language_id.description: Ren'Py language key; also the patch folder name game/tl/<language_id>/. Lowercase, no spaces, e.g. "thai", "french"

progress_file.description: Translations JSON: {english: translation}. Written incrementally; resumable.

speakers.description: Speaker code (as it appears in the .rpy scripts) -> character info. Feeds translation context and QA groups.

role.description: One-line description: relationship to protagonist, personality, register hints

keep_untranslated.description: Names and proper nouns that must stay exactly as written (no translation/transliteration). Also whitelists them for qa_check's untranslated-roman-word check.

style_guide_file.description: Markdown style guide (registers, formality, slang policy, few-shot examples). Loaded into the system prompt by translate_api.py and into context for in-session translation.

qa_rules_file.description: Declarative register/phrasing rules for qa_check.py. See references/qa.md.

font.description: Omit entirely if the game's fonts already cover the target script.

regular.description: Target-script font filename (must be copied into game/)

replace_fonts.description: The game's original font files to substitute via config.font_replacement_map

size_scale.description: Multiplier applied to base_sizes when the target language is active (some fonts render smaller at the same point size)

base_sizes.description: Style name -> the game's original point size for that style

styles.description: Style names to override; defaults to the common Ren'Py text styles

toggle_key.description: pygame key constant for the in-game language toggle

auto_set_language.description: Switch the game to the target language automatically on first launch (useful when the game has no language picker in Preferences)
